# Agent Observability Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must hand work to another desk or implementation agent.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: agent-observability-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
runtime_surface:
architecture_summary:
operational_questions:
failure_modes:
trace_events:
span_boundaries:
metrics:
log_policy:
dashboards:
alerts:
slo_targets:
runbook_links:
privacy_constraints:
redaction_rules:
retention_policy:
access_controls:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
